sessions.title: 5 embedding decisions every cloud developer needs to know
sessions.description: Latency, accuracy, and retrieval costs are make-or-break metrics for AI applications on Google Cloud. In this deep dive, Pete Johnson, MongoDB’s AI field CTO, will explore the “Big 5” configuration decisions that define the success of retrieval-augmented generation: chunking, similarity functions, dimensionality, quantization, and reranking. Learn how Voyage AI’s cutting-edge models and MongoDB Atlas let you optimize these parameters while hosting data in any Google Cloud data center. You’ll gain the technical know-how to fine-tune your embedding strategy for maximum efficiency. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: 5 minutes to launch: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience essentials
sessions.description: Transform the consumer experience with an instant AI agent built for search, shopping, and support. By replacing months of engineering with a zero-code setup, you can launch a customized agent that captures your brand voice in under five minutes. Operating seamlessly across Instagram, WhatsApp, and the Web, this agent leverages real-time conversation data to move beyond basic chat and proactively drive conversions. Join us as we interview The Honest Kitchen, an AI pioneer, on their firsthand experience with this agent.

We’ve taken Agentic SOC from potential to reality with Google SecOps - which means we’ve already paid the innovation tax so you don’t have to.

Join us for a backstage view into our lessons learned through real-world deployments of agentic workflows and by developing our own custom threat hunting agent. sessions.title: Accelerate agent development with Gemini CLI, MCP, and Weave

Manual tuning slows down AI development. Learn how to accelerate your iteration loop using the Gemini CLI and Weights & Biases Model Context Protocol (MCP). We’ll demonstrate optimizing a tool integrated chatbot agent, using Gemini to analyze traces, spot failure modes, and generate synthetic evaluation data. Learn to implement a dual optimization workflow that improves both your dataset and agent prompts, turning days of manual engineering into minutes of automated hill-climbing.

sessions.description: With rapidly evolving market demands, organizations are leveraging contextual knowledge in modernization from Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) and scalable, secure infrastructure from Google Cloud to enhance operational agility, improve time to market, and drive innovation across their global businesses. Join this session to understand how TCS’ customers are enabling faster application modernization and greater resilience, pivoting them to a future-ready IT landscape. sessions.title: Accelerate to innovate: How AI is rewriting the rules of data migration
sessions.description: In order to meet today’s AI moment, organizations are racing to modernize their data estates to unlock the transformative potential of generative AI. Lengthy and risky migrations are now a thing of the past, thanks to AI-powered migration services that dramatically reduce manual effort and de-risk migrations. In this session, industry leaders will share their migration journeys and how they’ve transformed data and AI innovation by modernizing their data platform with Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Accelerated modernization: Navigating the journey from SQL Server to PostgreSQL
sessions.description: Legacy SQL Server environments often anchor organizations to high licensing costs and rigid infrastructure, stifling the agility needed for modern growth. This session explores the technical and strategic roadmap for escaping those constraints by migrating to AlloyDB. Through the lens of Extric (Towbook), you will see how they modernized their application and transitioned away from restrictive legacy systems. By adopting AlloyDB’s built-in AI, Extric catalyzed innovation and slashed TCO, providing a proven blueprint for enhancing performance.

sessions.title: Accelerating alpha: Citadel's hybrid HPC and AI strategy
sessions.description: In the high-stakes world of quantitative finance, faster time to insight is the ultimate competitive advantage. Join leaders from Citadel and Google Cloud to explore how top financial services firms are redefining speed using large-scale Tensor Processing Units (TPUs). We’ll dissect Citadel’s “agentic engineering” approach to automating developer workflows and the architectural realities of evolving from on-premises to a hybrid, cloud-first high performance computing (HPC) environment. Discover strategies to balance extreme performance with agility to accelerate your own research infrastructure.

sessions.title: Achieve multicloud security at scale with Google Unified Security
sessions.description: The divide between proactive risk management and reactive threat response has become a critical vulnerability. For chief information security officers today, the challenge is no longer just seeing the threat – it’s understanding its business context fast enough to matter. In this breakout, we’ll share how Google is redefining security operations by fusing world-class threat detection and response with deep environmental context. You’ll learn how we’re breaking down silos by integrating rich risk insights from leading partners directly into the security operations center workflow, empowering teams to prioritize incidents based on real-world business risk rather than just technical severity.

sessions.title: Achieve state-of-the-art inference: High performance on TPUs and GPUs with llm-d
sessions.description: Proprietary stacks and generic open source solutions often lack deep hardware integration. Break free from proprietary constraints with llm-d, an open source stack that delivers state-of-the-art performance across Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and NVIDIA GPUs. This session dives deep into how to architect disaggregated serving and automatic key-value cache storage tiering on Ironwood (TPU7x). Learn to implement routing optimized for service-level objectives and build a portable, high-performance inference fleet that scales automatically based on real-time server conditions. Leave with a reference architecture for hardware-optimized LLM serving.

sessions.title: Adoption hurdles for AI at the workplace
sessions.description: For any IT or business leaders trying to scale AI adoption at the workplace, join this peer-to-peer rountable to discuss how to tackle the common, non-technical challenges of deploying AI, such as user training, change management, and internal resistance. Our Google expert will share the real-world stories they’ve seen in our Gemini Enterprise customers.

sessions.title: Advancements in generative media with Google DeepMind and Google Cloud
sessions.description: Join Google DeepMind experts for a technical update on the latest generative media models – Nano Banana, Veo, and Lyria – and to learn about their powerful capabilities. In this session, we’ll explore how Google DeepMind builds models with remarkable visual consistency, synchronized audio, and fine-grained creative control. And our partners from Canva and Figma will share how they’re empowering their users to build powerful new creative workflows.

sessions.title: Agent development framework for the agentic enterprise
sessions.description:
Moving Agentic AI from experiment to enterprise reality requires a structured path to production. Join 66degrees to explore our Agent Development Framework, designed to accelerate the development of secure multi-agent systems. We’ll demonstrate how to leverage Gemini Enterprise and Vertex AI to unlock next-generation business value through Agentic Teams. Discover how this "AI Factory" model acts as a force multiplier for enterprise clients, using modular architecture and governance to scale talent







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agent security at scale: Protect against the OWASP Top 10 application risks
sessions.description: Agentic applications can include multiple agents, tools, and model calls, creating a broad and complex attack surface. As developers move into production with these applications, security teams need to make sure they are thoroughly secured from critical threats identified by the Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP), including tool misuse and exploitation, prompt injection, and code hallucination, among others. In this session, we will help you understand new risks associated with agents, as well as key mitigation strategies and ways to implement those strategies using Google Cloud platform controls and security capabilities.

sessions.title: Agentic AI & Gemini: Optimal serverless infrastructure for developers
sessions.description: This Technical-200 session explores automating serverless infrastructure deployment using a Gemini-powered AI agent and the Gemini CLI. Learn to generate, manage, and secure configurations, focusing on sensitive .env files. We'll demonstrate integrating these agents with the Cloud SDK to build robust CI/CD pipelines for Cloud Run. Walk away with Python and shell script examples to achieve faster, safer infrastructure rollouts.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in action: Live demo
sessions.description:
See Dialpad’s agentic AI platform in action: no-code AI agents built and launched at the speed of thought, powered by a unified data plane that keeps customer history and business logic in sync. This fast-paced demo shows how autonomous agents and humans work together with shared context across telephony, contact centers, and business communications—eliminating repetition, breaking down silos, and turning every conversation into real-time action and measurable outcomes.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic AI Transformation for Leaders
sessions.description: Join this interactive workshop for leaders to master agentic transformation strategy. In this session, we will collaboratively walk through a strategy scenario for "Cymbal Meet," a video conferencing company, to pinpoint high-value business problems and apply a powerful framework for reimagining processes with AI agents. This workshop is ideal for Senior Executives ready to turn business challenges into intelligent, automated solutions and lead their company's AI innovation.

sessions.title: Agentic FinOps for BigQuery cost optimization
sessions.description: This talk draws from multi-year BigQuery optimization engagements with a leading hyperscaler enterprises. While traditional methods are reactive, this session architects the next evolution: the Agentic BigQuery FinOps Framework, a platform designed to manage petabyte-scale costs. We'll show how this agentic solution automates data collection into a centralized source of truth. The key innovation is integrating Generative AI-powered agents, elevating the platform from a static reporting tool to an interactive, on-demand analytics service. Learn how to empower users to ask natural-language questions—like "Identify large tables unused for over 90 days"—and receive data-driven optimization recommendations.

sessions.title: Agentic Logistics: Powering GXO IQ with Google Cloud, Vertex AI, and Gemini
sessions.description:
GXO, the world’s largest third-party, pure-play contract logistics provider, built GXO IQ to give customers enterprise‑grade logistics performance without enterprise‑level complexity. GXO IQ is an AI‑powered, agentic operating system that unifies billions of operational signals and decades of expertise into a single orchestration layer. Built on Google Cloud using GKE, Apigee, and Vertex AI with Gemini, it predicts demand, optimizes labor and pick paths, and triggers replenishment before orders drop. With an embedded conversational agent for real‑time insights, GXO IQ accelerates onboarding to weeks, reduces operational effort through automation, and delivers scalable end‑to‑end execution across the supply chain.
Use the GXO logo in the attached deck for the solution talk

sessions.title: Agentic SOC Experience
sessions.description: Let’s move beyond the AI hype, and experience AI that actually helps! Google Cloud Security enables the Agentic SOC with purpose built agents that helps you navigate the complex world of modern security operations, so you can focus on security where it matters most. Explore our most recent innovations - the SecOps Alert Triage Agent and Agentic Google Threat Intelligence in a hands-on session led by our Google Cloud Security experts. You’ll acquire real-world skills and practical knowledge to transform your organization’s defenses with Agentic AI.

sessions.title: Agentic transformation in the public sector
sessions.description: Today, the conversation around AI has fundamentally shifted from exploration and pilots to real-world, scaled deployments that drive impact. This session will spotlight leaders from across the public sector who are deploying agentic AI across their organization to empower their workforce, unlock new levels of productivity, and transform how services are delivered. This session provides a leadership blueprint for anyone looking to harness agentic AI to create lasting and measurable impact, right now.

sessions.title: Agents that deliver outcomes

sessions.title: AI adoption at workplace: A discussion on real-world journey
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn about real-world workplace AI adoption stories from your peers; and share your own experiences, challenges, and tips. This interactive discussion will cover the practical journey of bringing AI into the workplace. Participants will explore the human side of AI, focusing on the cultural and operational shifts necessary for successful implementation. We'll cover bridging the gap between executive vision and employee reality and dive into proven steps and frameworks for accelerating AI maturity within an organization. We'll explore strategies for skilling, upskilling, and change management to drive AI fluency and discuss developing internal "champion networks" while sharing best practices that spark innovation. Whether you are navigating initial pilots or scaling toward an AI-powered organization, this session will provide a practical leader's playbook for turning AI potential into tangible workplace results.

sessions.title: AI at enterprise scale: Williams Sonoma, Smyths Toys, and Northwell Health
sessions.description: How do you move AI from pilot to production? Join industry leaders for a raw look at the journey to enterprise innovation. Find out how Williams Sonoma leverages Google Cloud’s AI to transform its “Olive” agent from a web-based tool to a proactive, multimodal culinary companion. We’ll also explore how Gemini empowers Northwell Health to analyze resuscitation footage and surgical video to refine lifesaving care. And finally, we’ll uncover how Smyths Toys uses BigQuery for inventory intelligence and personalized play. Together, these leaders will show you how to build and innovate across Salesforce, SAP, and NetApp.

sessions.title: AI at Snap's scale: Building a global compute fabric with GKE custom compute classes
sessions.description: Hyperscale infrastructure hits a wall when integrating AI into global service meshes. To orchestrate obtainability-constrained accelerators, Snap and Google Cloud engineered a fundamental shift in Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) scaling. In this session, we’ll reveal the architecture of custom ComputeClasses, a feature born from Snap’s requirements that is now a standard part of GKE. Join us to learn to architect a mesh that mixes diverse AI compute resources to overcome supply constraints and scale workloads. And leave with the blueprint for optimizing performance and capacity at planetary scale on GKE.

sessions.title: AI driven, human led: Accelerate security outcomes with an agentic SOC
sessions.description: As agentic attacks increase in frequency and complexity, organizations must transform their security strategies to stay ahead of evolving threats. Join security leaders from Foresite, Netenrich, and TENEX.AI as they share how AI agents will continue to transform security operations, and how AI agents in Google Security Operations are supercharging security teams.

sessions.title: AI inference: Performance when you need it, economy when you don't
sessions.description: As Generative AI moves from pilot to production, the 'one-size-fits-all' approach to serving is no longer viable. Platform teams face the dual challenge of meeting stringent SLOs for real-time applications while minimizing TCO for high-volume, cost-sensitive tasks. In this session, we unveil GKE Inference Gateway innovations designed to solve this equation. Explore how GKE delivers multi-accelerator flexibility and disaggregated serving for optimal price-performance. We’ll demonstrate how to fortify models using Model Armor, agent identity, and token-based quota protections. Finally, discover how to optimize inference with accelerators spread across multiple cloud regions

sessions.title: AI SOC vs. AI in your SOC: What is real today and what is coming

Explore how AI currently impacts the security operations center (SOC) and how team roles will evolve. Chuvakin and Mellen will outline strategies for successfully adopting agentic technologies, including the nonnegotiable prerequisites for building a truly AI-ready SOC.

sessions.title: AI Software Lifecycle Meetup

Grounded in DORA’s latest research, this session welcomes everyone, whether you are an AI expert or just starting. Share real-world strategies, discuss challenges like trust, and learn how high-performing teams use AI to build better software.

sessions.title: AI upskilling strategies from the world's most innovative retailers
sessions.description: The AI transformation has changed the rules of business. The most successful organizations are winning because they’ve prioritized their people. Join us, along with Wayfair and Woolworths panelists, for a look into how they’re transforming their organizations by providing the skills needed to succeed with AI. You’ll get insights directly from leaders bridging the AI talent gap to drive real-world impact in the retail space – from accelerating digital transformation to boosting associate empowerment and retention. Get a behind-the-scenes look at how the world’s most innovative retailers are staying ahead of the competition.

sessions.title: AI-Powered Google Cloud Platform architecture diagramming platform
sessions.description: Stop drawing, start designing. This is the autonomous platform that uses a team of AI agents to design, validate, and diagram your GCP architecture in minutes. This solution goes beyond simple diagramming to create a truly intelligent design-to-deployment workflow.

sessions.title: AI-powered media management: Fox Sports, EPAM & Google Cloud Transform Workflows

Fox Sports partnered with EPAM and Google Cloud to modernize media asset management with the Intelligent Asset Service (IAS).

Powered by Vertex AI Vision, IAS enables fast, AI-driven search across 1.9 million videos.

This cloud-native platform, built and enhanced by EPAM, delivers real-time global content and demonstrates EPAM’s strength in turning advanced Google technology into scalable, client-ready solutions.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: All about agents with Google Cloud databases
sessions.description: Discuss the end-to-end experience of building agentic workflows using AI features in Google Cloud databases. This session explores how to unblock development roadblocks by mastering key capabilities. We will examine the best applications for Graph RAG, vector search, and multi-model queries. Learn how to execute complex queries that join SQL, examine complex relationships with graphs, and vector similarity searches in a single transaction, reducing latency and operational overhead.

sessions.title: AlloyDB AI in action: Powering next-gen search and intelligent agents
sessions.description: Discover the latest breakthroughs in enterprise AI. This session explores how AlloyDB AI delivers the extreme scale and precision required for sophisticated enterprise applications. We’ll also unveil the next generation of AlloyDB AI capabilities, including advanced hybrid search, seamless conversational interfaces for building intelligent agents, automated vector operations, and intelligent AI functions.

Join small-group discussions about the realities of rapid prototyping, improving existing applications, modernizing legacy applications, and build a network of experts pushing the boundaries. Come with your ideas and leave with practical insights for how to move even faster with confidence.

sessions.title: Antigravity for Enterprise Development
sessions.description: In this lightning talk, we'll deep dive into tips and features to make the most of Antigravity for complex, enterprise development tasks.

sessions.title: Architect trust: Enterprise guardrails for Google Workspace Studio
sessions.description: The rise of agentic automation has reached a turning point. Google Workspace Studio now enables users with zero coding experience to architect workflows. For the enterprise, this introduces a new frontier of security and compliance considerations. We’ll explore the critical intersection of user innovation and corporate command, and demonstrate how you and your workforce can safely automate at scale – from mitigating inadvertent data exposure to defending against malicious actors.

sessions.title: Architect with Google Axion: A decision framework for Arm workloads
sessions.description: Moving to Arm shouldn’t be a guessing game. Join experts for a breakdown of the Google Axion custom Arm-based processor family and how to map it to your specific workload requirements. We’ll examine the architectural differences between the cost-optimized N family and the performance-optimized C family, providing you with a definitive decision framework. Discover how to use features like custom machine types to run on the exact compute shape required. Learn from leading customers about how they’ve leveraged Axion for their businesses.

sessions.title: Architecting agentic observability: Scale and optimize agent quality
sessions.description: Multi-agent systems in production often suffer from hidden latency, quality drift, and unmonitored inference costs. This discussion group focuses on debugging agents and monitoring for agent quality using OpenTelemetry instrumentation and integrated evaluation on Agent Engine. We will deep dive into the technical mechanics of debugging ADK-based agents to identify performance bottlenecks. Bring your specific troubleshooting scenarios as we analyze real-time monitoring of agent-to-tool interactions. Walk away with an Agent Observability blueprint and an OTel deployment checklist.

sessions.title: Architecting agents: Scale and govern your AI workforce
sessions.description: Managing enterprise-scale AI ecosystems requires a centralized control plane to eliminate shadow AI and redundant development workflows. This discussion group will focus on AI agents and MCP servers. We'll deep dive into technical strategies for agents on Vertex AI Agent Engine and Cloud Run while enforcing identity-first security. Bring your integration challenges as we will troubleshoot Model Context Protocol (MCP) standards and identity and access management policy enforcement. Walk away with an Agent Registry deployment checklist and an MCP integration blueprint.

sessions.title: Architecting Enterprise GenAI: Building Production-Grade Agents on Vertex AI
sessions.description: Join us to whiteboard the production architecture of a real-world enterprise virtual agent. We’ll reverse-engineer a custom Vertex AI RAG stack, detailing how we used Agent Builder and the Reranker API to master complex retrieval. Learn the code-level patterns for seamless human handoff integration and how to automate quality evaluation with BigQuery. Leave with a blueprint for enterprise agentic AI.

sessions.title: Architecting for data diversity: A blueprint for intelligent cross-cloud retail
sessions.description: Stop wrestling with fragmented data silos and start building agents that actually understand your business. In a session resembling a developer talk show, we’ll solve the e-commerce mess by architecting a unified intelligence layer live. Learn to build a “polyglot brain” that orchestrates AlloyDB for vector search, MongoDB for flexible catalogs, and BigQuery for deep analytics – all tied together via the MCP Toolbox for Databases. We’ll show you how to pick the right tool for the job to eliminate data-diversity friction. You’ll come away with a scalable architectural pattern that turns chaotic Cloud Storage images and logs into real-time, conversational intelligence.

sessions.title: Architecting for memory: A deep dive on context engineering for production agents
sessions.description: A production agent is only as good as the information it has. Join this deep-dive discussion for architects and builders to explore advanced architectural patterns for context engineering, ensuring your agents can maintain stateful, personalized conversations at enterprise scale.

sessions.title: Architecting high-performance SaaS: Lessons from top ISVs
sessions.description: How do leading independent software vendors (ISVs) build platforms that are secure, scalable, and AI-ready? It starts with the right infrastructure foundation. Join technical leaders from our top ISV partners as they reveal the architectural decisions behind their technology. We’ll dive into how they use Compute Engine and Google Cloud Hyperdisk to eliminate storage bottlenecks and deliver extreme performance. Whether you’re building next-gen AI applications or protecting critical enterprise data, learn the design patterns that power the world’s most successful software.

sessions.title: Architecting Multi-Agent AI: A 2-Hour Workshop on the Agent Development Kit (ADK)
sessions.description: Step into the world of autonomous AI with this 2-hour Agent Development Kit (ADK) workshop. Move beyond basic chatbots and build sophisticated, multi-agent systems that reason, plan, and use tools. You will learn to create your first Gemini-powered agent, integrate custom APIs, and orchestrate specialized AI teams using Routers, Sequential Chains, and Parallel execution. Finally, master agent memory to manage complex, multi-step workflows seamlessly.

sessions.title: Architecting rack-scale AI: Inside Nvidia Blackwell on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Join engineering leaders from Google and Nvidia for a deep dive into building NVLink-connected, rack-scale systems. We’ll explore the system design and data center innovations required to enable A4X Max instances – powered by the Nvidia GB300 NVL72 – and consider the future A5X product line, powered by Nvidia’s Vera Rubin architectures. Beyond the hardware, you’ll learn how we solve the challenges of reliability, seamless maintenance, and advanced debugging at massive scale. Whether you are training frontier models or evolving your infrastructure, come gain the insights needed to architect for the next generation of AI.

sessions.title: Architecting reinforcement learning workflows for LLMs
sessions.description: Post-training is where real model value is created. Join this discussion to explore the next generation of scalable alignment using Tunix, a JAX-native toolkit. We'll debate the tradeoffs of advanced techniques like DPO, PPO, and RLOO, and dissect the architecture required to run them on Cloud TPUs. You'll be able to share your experiences taking workflows from local research to multi-node clusters. Whether you are a JAX expert or curious about the switch, come discuss how to democratize efficient LLM alignment.

sessions.title: Architecting the transactional lakehouse
sessions.description: Demystify the details of real-time data for transactional workloads. This session provides a deep dive into the architecture of the Transactional Lakehouse. We will discuss unifying your data estate to go beyond analytics, enhancing your data lake to support agentic experiences. Explore the specific "how-to's" of building a consistent, real-time foundation for your AI workloads.

sessions.title: Architecting trustworthy AI: how The Home Depot is using, building, and securing AI
sessions.description: AI is rapidly becoming the operating fabric of the modern enterprise – powering copilots, autonomous agents, and intelligent applications. Yet many organizations struggle to scale beyond isolated pilots due to shadow AI, fragmented controls, and growing security and compliance risks. In this session, we will hear from The Home Depot on how they are using AI for innovation while securing AI by design. We will move beyond theory to provide a transparent, real-world view of how to embed AI securely across a large enterprise and protect the full AI lifecycle.

sessions.title: Architecting with Ray on GKE: Apple's playbook
sessions.description: Building multi-tenant AI platforms is complex, often forcing teams to manage infrastructure instead of improving models. Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) provides a highly scalable environment to solve this problem. In this session, Apple shares their playbook. Discover how they use Ray on GKE to scale AI training, serving, and reinforcement learning. Learn how to apply this approach to accelerate your own AI development and deployment, offload maintenance from individual teams, ensure a consistent developer experience, and enforce security while maximizing hardware utilization.

sessions.title: Ask me anything with the Gemini CLI Extensions team
sessions.description: This discussion group extends the conversation on Gemini CLI Extensions covered in breakout session "One tool to rule them all: Extending and customizing the Gemini CLI."

sessions.title: Ask more from your agents with Google Antigravity
sessions.description: Software engineers do more than just code, and so should their tools. In this session, explore how Google Antigravity expands agent capabilities across the four main stages of the development process: defining what to build, planning the architecture, executing the build, and ensuring it meets quality assurance (QA) standards.

sessions.title: Assembling Digital Twins for Physical AI: Accelerate Sim-to-Real using NVIDIA Isaac Sim with Cosmos on Google Cloud
sessions.description: In this hands-on lab, you will explore how to dramatically enhance synthetic training data for Physical AI using NVIDIA’s Cosmos and Isaac Sim, all powered by Google Cloud G4 (RTX Pro 6000) instances. You will step through a complete, simulation-focused data-generation pipeline, starting by exploring a baseline environment in Isaac Sim to capture an initial dataset of robotic demonstrations. Next, you will enrich this baseline data using Cosmos, applying generative AI to create photorealistic, physically consistent variations with diverse lighting, textures, and object placements based on simple text prompts. Finally, you will conduct a side-by-side comparison of the datasets and policy rollouts, evaluating the visual diversity and robustness of models trained purely on standard simulation data versus those trained on the Cosmos-generated dataset to see firsthand how generative modeling on Google Cloud unlocks significant performance gains.

sessions.title: Automated PII redaction for genAI and MCP
sessions.description: Explore the hidden compliance nightmare of observability - logs sanitization. We’ll move beyond fragile Regex filters and in-code implementation patterns. Attendees will talk through the use of intelligent detection layers to identify sensitive entities in flight. Discuss how to apply it for AI and non AI application. Leave with a blueprint for a "Zero-Trust Logging" pipeline

sessions.title: Automating large-scale training operations on Vertex AI
sessions.description: Join this interactive technical session to go beyond the slides and explore the engineering realities of leveraging Vertex AI Training Clusters at scale. Designed for ML and platform engineers, this open forum invites you to engage directly with the speakers on the architectural nuances of cluster lifecycle automation and fault tolerance. Bring your questions, complaints, experiences about operating large clusters for the development of state-of-the-art models.

sessions.title: Best Buy's blueprint for agentic customer care
sessions.description: Best Buy empowers customers to effortlessly self-serve across interactive voice response (IVR), chat, and digital channels. Join this session to learn how they use Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience to replace frustrating legacy phone menus with next-generation agentic experiences, resolving 35% of the millions of calls they receive to deliver a frictionless customer journey. Discover how Google’s platform provides data insights to continually optimize transfer rates.

sessions.title: Beyond AI optimism: 5 ways to move from saving time to sparking innovation
sessions.description:
What’s the real impact of AI? New research from Google Workspace, spanning six markets and more than 2,500 leaders, reveals a stark disconnect. While leaders are optimistic about AI, only 3% of companies have truly transformed.* Join our panel as we unpack what the data tells us about what’s required to move from optimism to real business value. We’ll discuss bridging the gap between executive vision and employee reality, and share 5 steps to accelerate AI maturity in your organization.

* Google/Hypothesis Group, Beyond AI Optimism, Global, online survey, n=2,643 decision-makers and knowledge workers at mid-market or enterprise organizations, July 18, 2025–August 11, 2025.

sessions.title: Beyond backup: What cyber recovery actually requires today
sessions.description:
Legacy snapshots, custom scripts, and versioning weren't built for today's cyber threats. When attackers strike, can you identify the blast radius, verify your recovery point is clean, and restore operations with confidence? To actually recover your business, you need three critical capabilities: immutable copies that attackers can't delete, air-gapped storage they can't reach, and verified identities to access them. This session explores what true cyber recovery requires for organizations running critical Google workloads, such as Google Compute Engine, Google Cloud SQL, and Google Workspace. Leave with a framework to evaluate whether your organization is ready to recover from a cyber attack.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Beyond Chatbots: Building Realtime Multimodal Agents with the Gemini Live API
sessions.description: With the Gemini model family, building sophisticated multimodal agents has never been more accessible. For developers, the next frontier is moving beyond text-based chat to create agents that can see, hear, and respond in real-time. In this lightning talk, we'll explore the Gemini Live API to explore how it enables developers to handle text, audio, and video streams simultaneously. We’ll demonstrate how to use bidirectional WebSocket streaming to build low-latency, natural, and engaging voice agents that truly understand their environment.

We will demonstrate how Foresite delivers Strategic Coverage through "Glass Box" audit trails and least-privilege enforcement, ensuring that autonomous workflows produce visible, defensible outcomes rather than unmanaged liability.

sessions.title: Beyond the buzz: How AI is actually transforming modern security
sessions.description: AI has changed everything for security. On the one hand, it is now essential to how modern security teams operate at scale. sessions.title: Beyond the hype: How leading businesses win with Gemini Enterprise

sessions.title: Beyond the prototype: Scaling production-grade agents with Gemini

In this session, we deconstruct the engineering roadmap to take agents out of the lab and into production on Google Cloud. We’ll tackle the critical hurdles of validation, infrastructure overhead, and risk mitigation. Leave with a proven strategy to accelerate time-to-market and transform your MVPs into scalable, high-value enterprise realities.

sessions.title: Beyond the sandbox: Redefine AI-native apps with GKE, Axion processors, and C4 instances

In this session, we’ll share our experience running multihost inference workloads on Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) using Pathways, which provides a unified runtime for coordinating computation and communication across many TPU hosts.

This talk shares our development journey: integrating Live API with RAG infrastructure, designing function calling patterns, managing conversation context, and optimizing performance. Drawing from industry patterns and production failures, learn what it actually takes to ship agents that work at scale.

sessions.title: Built-in defense: The next evolution of Security Command Center for AI-era
sessions.description: Security Command Center (SCC) is built into the Google Cloud infrastructure providing native defense for your most critical assets. Join this session to learn how SCC's line-of-sight visibility  protects your environment across cloud and AI workloads. We’ll break down the complete security lifecycle - implementing preventive controls to stop attacks, identifying high-risk vulnerabilities, and detecting active threats using embedded technology. Discover how the new Cloud Assist capability delivers detailed remediation guidance, learn first-hand from a leading customer, and discover how to secure your next era of innovation.

In this panel, PwC’s Dallas Dolen joins industry visionaries to discuss whether the infrastructure build-out will lead to a new era of productivity or a bubble of stranded assets – and what it truly takes to democratize AI. We’ll explore how Google’s vertical advantage – owning the entire stack, from custom TPU silicon to data centers to Gemini models – defies standard unit economics, and how the world’s largest organizations are plugging into this grid to build their own operational AI factories. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Threat hunters unite: A discussion on Agentic defense
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn ways to generate detection rules based on emerging threats. Come prepared to share insights with peers in a smaller more collaborative setting.

sessions.title: ThreatSpace APT Hunting
sessions.description: Join us for an immersive session of threat hunting for APTs in Google’s ThreatSpace range. This is not a demo or a lecture heavy session, just a chance for you to build, test, and hone your threat hunting skills. Everyone is able to participate with different levels of guides to support the security curious to security experts. Use Google Security Operations to determine all threat actor activities and use Google Threat Intelligence to provide attribution. Each day will align to a different APT, so join us to see if you can correctly identify all three APT threat actors. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: TPU inference: Portability, cost, and scaling for state of the art
sessions.description: Demystifying TPU inference doesn't have to require writing custom compilers. Join this collaborative discussion to exchange strategies for deploying vLLM and other frameworks across Google Cloud hardware. We will dissect real-world implementations, debating the business tradeoffs between time-to-first-token latency and raw throughput, the reality of switching workloads between GPUs and TPUs, and overcoming the production friction of cold-starts and OOMs. Bring your deployment headaches and swap real-world battle stories with fellow ML engineers and platform architects.

sessions.title: Trading in the cloud: How capital markets future-proof their infrastructure
sessions.description: FSI and capital markets face a unique challenge, where trading infrastructure capacity is heavily dependent on economic factors. Financial exchanges must offer open and fair access to markets while providing determinism and regulatory compliance.

sessions.title: Transform community services and outcomes with AI
sessions.description: What does it take to build a truly responsive government? It requires moving beyond simple digitization to fundamentally reimagine how services are delivered. This session will feature leaders who are making that shift happen. Learn how forward-thinking agencies are applying the power of AI to personalize experiences at an unprecedented scale, automate complex processes to unlock new levels of efficiency, and ensure greater access to support and care. Join us to see how AI is being used to power a more efficient government that benefits everyone.

sessions.title: Transform static backups with Eon to power Agentic AI
sessions.description:
Stop treating backups as dead weight. Join Eon to transform static BigQuery, GCS, and GCE snapshots into live assets. We will demonstrate how to create a queryable data lake for RAG and agentic AI using your existing data. You will leave with a strategy for automated governance and isolated storage that accelerates your data roadmap without the overhead of traditional recovery.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Transform workflows with Gemini and the Google partner ecosystem
sessions.description: Unlocking the full potential of AI requires empowering every employee and connecting intelligence to every corner of your business. Learn from leaders at Asana and Intuit who are helping democratize secure AI by integrating their solutions across Gemini and Google Workspace, enabling cross-platform AI in the core workflows we all depend on. Discover how our partner ecosystem is the key to realizing a greater impact from AI.

sessions.title: Transform your passive catalog to active context for AI agent governance
sessions.description: Governance is moving rapidly from passive documentation to active context for agents, introducing the industry’s first universal registry governing tables, models, and autonomous agents. Join this session to learn how to supply the semantic context necessary to govern agent behavior by automating metadata augmentation – for example, generating descriptions, discovering relationships, and offering join recommendations. Discover how to build and transform your catalog for AI into a dynamic control plane for safe, context-aware AI.

sessions.title: Transform your passive catalog to active context for AI agent governance
sessions.description: Join this interactive breakout to learn how to operationalize the shift from static documentation to active AI governance. We will drill down into the specifics of automating relationship discovery and join recommendations, providing a roadmap for transforming your data catalog into a command center for context-aware AI.

sessions.title: Turn developer feedback into content recommendations with Gemini
sessions.description: Go behind the scenes of a Google Cloud case study using Gemini to decode developer feedback from bugs, support tickets, and social channels. We’ll demo an insights dashboard and an automation system that transforms siloed friction data into actionable product and documentation recommendations. Learn to combine Gemini’s entity extraction with BigQuery Graph to identify developer struggles and automate content updates. Find out how graph-based retrieval-augmented generation streamlines the triage loop between engineering, tech writing, and support by filtering noise, tracking sentiment, and generating documentation requests.

sessions.title: Turn your AI into a local expert: Building agents with real-world reasoning
sessions.description: Join this session to learn how Grounding with Google Maps in Vertex AI turns AI agents into “local experts” with over 300 million places, routing details, and reviews. Whether your app is providing targeted trip planning or offering tailored “what’s nearby” recommendations, learn to customize AI outputs by combining your proprietary data with Google Maps. We’ll feature a “Day Planner Agent” demo that takes you through how to orchestrate Gemini 3 Pro with the ground truth of Google Maps and Google Workspace to solve complex scheduling scenarios.

sessions.title: Under the hood for startups: How Google DeepMind makes modeling decisions
sessions.description: What actually happens between a research breakthrough and an API release? Google DeepMind product managers will pull back the curtain on the trade-offs made while building models such as Gemini, Gemma, and Nano Banana. Find out how we prioritize reasoning vs. latency and long context vs. cost, so you can align your startup’s roadmap with the next generation of frontier intelligence.

sessions.title: Unify full-stack observability with Firebase Crashlytics on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Your application is only as healthy as your users’ perception of it. While Google Cloud Observability excels at server-side monitoring, the client’s perspective has persisted as a gap. Join us to learn about the collaboration between Firebase Crashlytics and Google Cloud Observability to solve for this. We’ll unveil the vision for an AI-native, end-to-end real user monitoring (RUM) solution built directly on Google Cloud’s application platform, including App Hub and Application Design Center.

sessions.title: Unifying your defense: Chrome Enterprise Premium & Google Unified Security
sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

sessions.title: Unifying your defense: Chrome Enterprise Premium & Google Unified Security
sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

sessions.title: Unlock dark data: Enable built-in AI data curation that's simpler and faster
sessions.description: Stop drowning in “dark” unstructured data. New Cloud Storage features transform passive buckets into an active semantic layer, unlocking unsearchable archives for high-priority AI innovation. Through auto annotate, Cloud Storage Model Context Protocol server, and a stealthy new discovery capability, you can now curate data faster to deploy context-aware AI agents and retrieval-augmented generation workflows. Join representatives from L’Oreal and Snap as they share how they leveraged these innovations to dramatically accelerate their AI journeys.

sessions.title: Unlock data insights: Conversational Analytics agents, API, and MCP
sessions.description: Data insights from agents need trust, governance, and scale. This session demonstrates how Conversational Analytics agents let you unleash the value of your modern petabyte-scale data stack across BigQuery, Dataplex Universal Catalog, and the Looker semantic layer. Learn how to feel confident in governed and trustworthy data agents via monitoring and evaluation tools, and how to deploy agents where your users work with the Conversational Analytics API and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Join us to learn what’s coming next for more proactive and insightful Conversational Analytics agents.

sessions.title: Unlock enterprise data and drive AI adoption with Sensitive Data Protection
sessions.description: Without the right safeguards and controls, AI agents and applications can put your most important data at risk. Join this technical session to demystify our latest data security solutions. You’ll discover how to automatically identify and redact sensitive information in AI training data, secure datasets with customer-managed encryption and security perimeters, and filter traffic in Gemini Enterprise and Vertex AI to prevent high-value data leakage. You’ll also learn how to use data security posture management in Security Command Center to govern the storage, movement, and processing of data across your entire AI lifecycle.

sessions.title: Unlock high-performance AI with the new Cloud TPU experience
sessions.description: While Cloud Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) are renowned for training the world’s most advanced generative AI models, their architecture is engineered to accelerate a vast spectrum of complex workloads. Join us to discover the latest updates to the Cloud TPU experience – including flexible new access models, comprehensive observability, and enterprise-grade service level objectives (SLOs) – designed to empower developers and researchers and deliver predictable reliability. Real-world success takes center stage as Citadel Securities shares their journey using Cloud TPUs for high-performance financial modeling. Learn how they conquered massive infrastructure hurdles to achieve exceptional ROI and accelerated time to market.

sessions.title: Unlock public sector growth with Marketplace
sessions.description: Ready to accelerate your Public Sector business? Discover how to leverage Google Cloud Marketplace for rapid growth. We’ll guide you through Private Marketplace expansion and the two-tier Designated Seller of Record (DSOR) model to simplify operations and finance. Hear real-world success stories and learn how to partner with Carahsoft’s team to unlock vast services. Join us to streamline your path to revenue and reduce complexity.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

sessions.title: Unlock the potential of Spanner: A new frontier for your data
sessions.description: Imagine harnessing the legendary consistency and scale of Spanner without limits. In this session, we’ll unveil a flexible new way to deploy Google’s distributed database, putting data where it’s needed for performance, compliance, and peace of mind. Learn how we’re making Spanner more adaptable, empowering you to build the next generation of mission-critical and AI-driven applications in entirely new ways. Join us to discover the future of database innovation that’s breaking down the barriers between your data and your developers.

sessions.title: Unlock your data's true meaning with BigQuery multimodal vector search
sessions.description: Learn how to go beyond simple text matching to perform highly relevant similarity searches on unstructured data – including images, audio, and video. In this session, learn to build serverless indexes powered by Google’s cutting-edge ScaNN (Scalable Nearest Neighbor) technology that scale to billions of embeddings. We’ll demonstrate how to integrate these semantic insights directly with BigQuery analytics to power next-gen recommendation engines, entity resolution, and hyper-personalized user experiences.

sessions.title: Unlocking enterprise actions: Bridge your APIs to AI agents with MCP and Apigee
sessions.description: As generative AI moves from conversation to execution, your agents need reliable access to enterprise capabilities. In this session, discover how to transform your existing API landscape into an agent-ready ecosystem using Apigee. We’ll demonstrate how to instantly create Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers from existing enterprise APIs and “boost” API specifications to ensure high-accuracy consumption by LLMs. Join us to learn advanced techniques for generating specifications directly from API logs, registering third-party MCPs, and securing your MCP servers with robust policies. And find out how Apigee enables your agents to utilize enterprise capabilities securely and at scale.

sessions.title: Untrusted code, unprecedented speed: High-velocity runtimes for AI agents
sessions.description: The rise of autonomous AI agents presents a dual challenge: scaling agent throughput and safely running untrusted, LLM-generated code. This session will explore techniques for building agent infrastructure that address both performance and security while bringing Gemini’s power to AI code-execution use cases. We’ll demonstrate how to enable subsecond cold starts for massive concurrency, and how gVisor’s kernel-level isolation provides a zero-trust environment to protect your infrastructure. We’ll also examine how LangChain, a leading AI agent platform, is leveraging this architecture to deliver autonomous agent experiences at massive scale.

sessions.title: Upskilling your organization
sessions.description: Join the Google Skills product team for an interactive conversation focused on organizational upskilling. This is a unique opportunity for individuals who are involved in learning and enablement at their organizations, to engage directly with the Google Skills platform team. Come share your experiences, outline your wish list for your organization’s transformation goals, and help shape our roadmap.

sessions.title: Use Model Context Protocol (MCP) Tools with ADK Agents
sessions.description: Unify your AI integrations with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). MCP standardizes how LLMs access external data and tools. In this advanced workshop, you will explore two critical workflows: configuring an Agent Development Kit (ADK) agent to consume resources from existing MCP servers, and building a custom MCP server to expose your own ADK tools to outside clients. Learn to create seamless, bi-directional connections between your agents and external applications using this powerful open standard.

sessions.title: User-journey-first observability using SLOs, Gemini, and Cloud Monitoring
sessions.description:
When your alerts lack context, you lose sight of the user experience. But when relevant context is spread across many sources of record, pulling it all together into a coherent story becomes a challenge.
See how The Home Depot solves this problem with their open source-compatible observability platform based on Cloud Monitoring. Their SLO alerts trigger Gemini to correlate data across disparate data sources and suggest a course of action, tying everything back to the SLO to highlight the impact of outages from a user experience perspective.

sessions.title: Velocity & transparency: The new RaMP model for migration
sessions.description: Unlocking Incentives: The New RaMP Model: Explore the major redesign of the Rapid Migration and Modernization Program (RaMP), built to accelerate the journey from legacy infrastructure to AI adoption. This session details the program’s streamlined commercial model, offering predictable incentives for both general and strategic workloads. Join us to discover how the evolved RaMP program aligns partner profitability with customer success—turning migration from a technical hurdle into a launchpad for AI transformation.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Vibe from code to cloud: Create and deploy apps directly from your IDEs
sessions.description: Vibe coding transforms development, but can it handle enterprise rigor? Join us to learn how Gemini Cloud Assist and Google Antigravity agents bridge the gap. We’ll demonstrate a complete life cycle – starting with platform engineers publishing catalogs of approved modules, which enable developers to build intent-driven apps. Observe Gemini Cloud Assist analyze code to propose compliant infrastructure, automate identity and access management, remediate deployment failures, and generate continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipelines. Unify velocity with governance – stop fighting over tickets and start shipping with context.

sessions.title: Vibed into reality: Bring your ideas to life with Firebase and Google AI
sessions.description: As we enter the era of agent-native development, Firebase provides deep integrations with Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity to transform your vibed prototypes into feature-rich, production-ready apps. Join this session to learn how Firebase empowers coding agents to handle the toughest parts of building a robust backend, including provisioning databases, implementing user authentication, managing security, and even deploying apps – all without the need for manual configuration.

sessions.title: Vibing with Google Antigravity: Custom web AI solutions and shareable skills
sessions.description: Google’s Gemini 3 offers a leap forward in creating technically complex solutions when integrated with standard web-engineering workflows. Join Googlers Jason Mayes, web AI lead, and Alex Astrum, developer relations engineer, to learn how seasoned engineers can use Google Antigravity and Gemini 3 to save a staggering amount of time. Mayes will demonstrate web AI solutions, using LiteRT.js to create a retrieval-augmented generation system with minimal effort while maintaining control. And Astrum will cover creating reusable skills that your team can lean on to scale out productivity gains.

sessions.title: What's new in Firebase
sessions.description: Ready to go hands-on with modern app development? Move beyond the keynote announcements and dive into the practical "how-to" using the latest Firebase features. This peer-led discussion is your interactive space to share experiences, solve challenges, and bridge the gap between rapid client-side iteration and enterprise-grade cloud power.

sessions.title: What's New in Gemini 3
sessions.description: Take your AI development to the next level with Gemini 3. In this introductory, hands-on workshop, you will explore the distinct strengths of the Gemini 3 models—balancing the deep reasoning capabilities of Gemini 3 Pro with the high-speed efficiency of Gemini 3 Flash. You will gain practical experience managing reasoning capabilities and multimodal inputs, equipping you to build smarter, faster, and more cost-effective AI applications.

sessions.title: What's new in Gemma: Google DeepMind's family of open models
sessions.description: The Gemma family of open models continues to expand, providing state-of-the-art tools to build a wide range of AI applications, from sovereign AI to scientific research to consumer products. In this session, go beyond the models and dive into the practical tools that make them usable at scale. Discover how to experiment with and deploy your favorite open models with Vertex AI and Hugging Face. We’ll guide you through an end-to-end pipeline, taking you from model discovery to full-scale deployment.

sessions.title: What's new in Spanner: Enterprise-scale agentic AI, operations, and analytics
sessions.description: Discover how Spanner is redefining the future of databases. Join this session to learn how to power agentic AI with integrated vectors, graphs, and search. Explore how to build interactive global applications with geo-partitioning and latency optimizations. Find out how the Spanner columnar engine unifies transactions and analytics, delivering real-time insights without data movement. Learn from leading organizations why Spanner is the database for what’s next, from modernizing critical, always-on, and secure systems to building a new generation of autonomous applications.

sessions.title: What's new with Compute Engine workloads and AI-ready infrastructure
sessions.description: Be among the first to learn about the latest Compute Engine product announcements. In this session, we’ll unveil exciting new capabilities to enable emerging workloads and deliver leading performance for your most critical workloads. From workload-optimized VMs for AI and machine learning to high-performance solutions for enterprise applications and databases, discover how our newest compute innovations can transform your infrastructure. We’ll dive deep into product capabilities, share VM selection best practices, and help you match the right VM to every workload to maximize performance and ROI.

sessions.title: What's new with data agents
sessions.description: Discover the latest in data analytics agents. In this session, we’ll explore enhanced built-in capabilities designed to streamline workflows across data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. Learn to build custom agents grounded in your enterprise data using new developer tools, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. Find out how to access these powerful features seamlessly via the Gemini CLI and IDEs like Google Antigravity to supercharge your productivity.

sessions.title: Your data, your models, your future: The new standard for Confidential AI
sessions.description: Security should never be a bottleneck to innovation. Join us to see how Google Cloud is future-proofing privacy for the AI era. We’ll unveil a comprehensive set of innovations ranging from post-quantum cryptography key management to the expansion of Confidential AI systems across CPUs and GPUs on Google Cloud. Learn how these capabilities allow you to process sensitive data and train proprietary models with the highest level of assurance, protecting your assets against both current and future threats.
